$schema: Per-1M-token prices in USD. Snapshot of published pricing as of the AVP build date for the default-table models (Anthropic, plus common OpenRouter models for cross-provider runs); consumers operating in production SHOULD override with their own price file via `compute_cost(prices=...)` rather than rely on the bundled values staying current.
$cache_write_convention: cache_write is the 5-minute-cache-write rate. Anthropic also publishes a 1-hour rate (typically ~1.6x the 5min rate); v0.1's single-rate model uses 5min as the default representative rate. Override the price table if your traffic mix is dominantly 1h-cached.
